name: on PDU_change
title: on PDU_change
description: The event procedure is called whenever the specified PDU is changed, but not if it is simply updated without a value change. You can use the event procedure only for PDUs of the new communication concept of CANoe.

parameters.name: <PDU>
parameters.description: Designates the PDU on which the procedure shall be called.

row: ChangeTimeNS Last time the value was changed, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
UpdateTimeNS Last time the value was updated, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
<SignalName> Value of the signal. Must be accessed with $this.
